Box #3—Divide It Up
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #2—Box#3 Divide it Up
*What might you divide up—or make easy to divide up?
A market? A department? A task? Turn one ad, sales page or sales email into multiple ones?
One reason this technique works so well is that while you may not have a lot of ideas for the
problem or opportunity as a whole, when you divide it up you often have lots of great ideas for
those individual parts!
*How might you divide it more than it already is?
Scientists keep discovering smaller and smaller particles. In the same way, you may think
something cannot be divided up further. But think again! For example, you have to assign
a report. Could one person do the research? Another, the writing? Yet another, the editing?
Or, you have a market that you’ve already segmented into high-frequency purchasers and
lower-frequency purchasers. But could you divide it further?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
